meaning: 1. to fish out; 2. to take out (from a pocket, bag etc)
sentence: 他从口袋里掏出一把钥匙。
pinyin: Tā cóng kǒudài lǐ tāo chū yī bǎ yàoshi.
english: He fished a key out of his pocket.

meaning: 1. to coexist; 2. to get along (with others)
sentence: 室友之间要学会和平共处。
pinyin: Shìyǒu zhījiān yào xuéhuì hépíng gòngchǔ.
english: Roommates need to learn to coexist peacefully.

sentence: 警犬是社区安全的忠实卫士。
pinyin: Jǐngquǎn shì shèqū ānquán de zhōngshí wèishì.
english: Police dogs are faithful guardians of community safety.

sentence: 他是一位获奖无数的剧作家。
pinyin: Tā shì yī wèi huòjiǎng wúshù de jùzuòjiā.
english: He is a playwright who has won numerous awards.

meaning: 1. (of sb or sth) whole or entire body
sentence: 这只猫通体雪白，非常漂亮。
pinyin: Zhè zhī māo tōngtǐ xuě bái, fēicháng piàoliang.
english: This cat is snow-white all over its body and very beautiful.
